heading: ## `/livespec-core:next` spec-side thin-transport skill
reason: Phase B.1 (li-3ax) — authored bin/next.py + commands/next.py (pure-function-of-file-state ranker) + next_output.schema.json wire contract + paired dataclass + validator. Doctor-cache integration deferred to a follow-on once the cache format is formalized via propose-change.
